concerns.text: SC-003 requires correlation coefficient (0.8 cutoff) validation across solvent classes, but no task explicitly computes or validates this metric. T031 only calculates residuals and RMSE stratified by solvent class.
SC-005 requires measuring the percentage of dataset pairs with documented uncertainty bounds, but no task explicitly calculates this percentage metric. T015 only populates uncertainty columns.

Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/ for reproducibility, but no task explicitly implements this requirement. T002 initializes project but does not mention random seed pinning.
Constitution Principle V requires content hashes on every artifact, but T009 only sets up the checksumming framework without explicitly enforcing hash generation across all files.
Constitution Principle VII requires p-value failures to be explicitly flagged in the paper as limitations, but tasks only save regression results to CSV without ensuring paper documentation.

Constitution Principle VI requires physical parameters recorded with source citations AND temperature conditions in data/parameters.csv, but T005 and T017 do not explicitly ensure both elements are present together in that file.
